transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a physical therapist I found is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Yes, it's Karen Whitfield, born March 4th, 1979.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Karen. I see you're on the Silverline Choice PPO plan. What's the provider's name or clinic?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: It's Dr. Nolan Reyes at Brightpath Physical Therapy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check... good news, Brightpath Physical Therapy is in-network under your plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh perfect, that's a relief. Do I need a referral first?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No referral needed for your plan, just a copay of twenty-five dollars per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Great, that's exactly what I needed to know. Thank you so much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Karen. Have a good rest of your day.
